7 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
8 /* DoFLinearSystem.h (C) 2022-2025 */
9 /* */
10 /* Linear system: Matrix A + Vector x + Vector b for Ax=b wit DoFs. */
11 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
12 #ifndef ARCANEFEM_FEMUTILS_DOFLINEARSYSTEM_H
13 #define ARCANEFEM_FEMUTILS_DOFLINEARSYSTEM_H
14 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
15 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
16 
17 #include <arcane/utils/UtilsTypes.h>
18 
19 #include <arcane/core/VariableTypedef.h>
20 #include <arcane/core/ItemTypes.h>
21 
22 #include "FemUtilsGlobal.h"
23 
24 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
25 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
26 
27 namespace Arcane::FemUtils
28 {
29 class AlienBSRFormat ;
30 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
31 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
47 class DoFLinearSystemRowEliminationHelper
48 {
49  friend DoFLinearSystem;
50 
51  private:
52 
53  explicit DoFLinearSystemRowEliminationHelper(DoFLinearSystem* dof_ls);
54 
55  public:
56 
57  ~DoFLinearSystemRowEliminationHelper();
58 
59  public:
60 
61  /*
62  * \brief Eliminate the row \a row of the linear system.
63  *
64  * The elimination is equivalent to the following calls:
65  * - matrixSetValue(row,j,0) for j!=row
66  * - matrixSetValue(row,row,1.0)
67  * - RHS[rc] = value
68  *
69  * The row is only eliminated when solve() is called.
70  * Any call to matrixAddValue(row,...)
71  * or matrixSetValue(row,...) are discarded.
72  *
73  * \note After a row elimination the matrix may no longer be symmetric.
74  */
75  void addElimination(DoFLocalId row, Real value);
76 
77  VariableDoFByte& getEliminationInfo();
78  VariableDoFReal& getEliminationValue();
79 
80  private:
81 
82  DoFLinearSystem* m_dof_linear_system = nullptr;
83 };
84 
85 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
86 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
102 class DoFLinearSystemRowColumnEliminationHelper
103 {
104  friend DoFLinearSystem;
105 
106  private:
107 
108  explicit DoFLinearSystemRowColumnEliminationHelper(DoFLinearSystem* dof_ls);
109 
110  public:
111 
112  ~DoFLinearSystemRowColumnEliminationHelper();
113 
114  public:
115 
116  /*
117  * \brief Eliminate the row \a row of the linear system.
118  *
119  * The elimination is equivalent to the following calls:
120  * - matrixSetValue(row,j,0) for j!=row
121  * - matrixSetValue(row,row,1.0)
122  * - RHS[rc] = value
123  *
124  * The row is only eliminated when solve() is called.
125  * Any call to matrixAddValue(row,...)
126  * or matrixSetValue(row,...) are discarded.
127  *
128  * \note After a row elimination the matrix may no longer be symmetric.
129  */
130  void addElimination(DoFLocalId row, Real value);
131 
132  VariableDoFByte& getEliminationInfo();
133  VariableDoFReal& getEliminationValue();
134 
135  private:
136 
137  DoFLinearSystem* m_dof_linear_system = nullptr;
138 };
139 
140 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
141 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
154 class DoFLinearSystem
155 {
156  friend DoFLinearSystemRowEliminationHelper;
157  friend DoFLinearSystemRowColumnEliminationHelper;
158 
159  public:
160 
161  DoFLinearSystem();
162  ~DoFLinearSystem();
163  DoFLinearSystem(const DoFLinearSystem&) = delete;
164  DoFLinearSystem(DoFLinearSystem&&) = delete;
165  DoFLinearSystem& operator=(DoFLinearSystem&&) = delete;
166  DoFLinearSystem& operator=(const DoFLinearSystem&) = delete;
167 
168  public:
169 
170  /*
171  * \brief Initialize the instance.
172  */
173  void initialize(ISubDomain* sd, IItemFamily* dof_family, const String& solver_name);
174 
180  void initialize(ISubDomain* sd, Runner* runner, IItemFamily* dof_family, const String& solver_name);
181 
183  [[nodiscard]] bool isInitialized() const;
184 
186  void matrixAddValue(DoFLocalId row, DoFLocalId column, Real value);
187 
194  void matrixSetValue(DoFLocalId row, DoFLocalId column, Real value);
195 
196  /*
197  * \brief Helper class to eliminate rows in the linear system.
198  *
199  * The elimination of row \a row is equivalent to the following calls:
200  * - matrixSetValue(row,j,0) for j!=row
201  * - matrixSetValue(row,row,1.0)
202  * - RHS[rc] = value
203  *
204  * The rows are only eliminated when solve() is called.
205  * Any call to matrixAddValue(row,...)
206  * or matrixSetValue(row,...) for eliminated rows are discarded.
207  *
208  * \note After a row elimination the matrix may no longer be symmetric.
209  */
210  DoFLinearSystemRowEliminationHelper rowEliminationHelper();
211 
212  /*
213  * \brief Eliminate rows and columns of the linear system.
214  *
215  * The elimination for a row \a row is equivalent to the following calls:
216  * - matrixSetValue(rc,j,0) for j!=rc
217  * - matrixSetValue(i,rc,0) for i!=rc
218  * - matrixSetValue(rcw,rc,1.0)
219  * - RHS[i] = RHS[i] - A[rc,i] * value for i!=rc
220  * - RHS[rc] = value
221  *
222  * The rows are only eliminated solve() when solve() is called.
223  * Any call to matrixAddValue(row,...), matrixSetValue(row,...),
224  * matrixAddValue(...,row) or matrixSetValue(...,row) for eliminated row
225  * are discarded.
226  */
227  DoFLinearSystemRowColumnEliminationHelper rowColumnEliminationHelper();
228 
238  void applyLinearSystemTransformationAndSolve();
239 
247  void applyMatrixTransformation();
248 
257  void applyRHSTransformation();
258 
265  void solve();
266 
272  void reset();
273 
280  void clearValues();
281 
287  VariableDoFReal& solutionVariable();
288 
295  VariableDoFReal& rhsVariable();
296 
298  void setLinearSystemFactory(IDoFLinearSystemFactory* factory)
299  {
300  m_linear_system_factory = factory;
301  }
302 
303  /*
304  * \brief Set the arguments for the solver initialisation.
305  *
306  * This method has to be called before the first call to solve().
307  *
308  * Currently it only works when the implementation is Aleph and when
309  * the underlying solver is PETSc. In this case the arguments in \a args
310  * are passed to PetscInitialize().
311  *
312  * \note The call to PetscInitialize() is only done one time during the
313  * simulation so only the first solver using PETSc will proceed
314  * to the initialisation.
315  */
316  void setSolverCommandLineArguments(const CommandLineArguments& args);
317 
325  void setCSRValues(const CSRFormatView& csr_view);
326 
328  [[nodiscard]] bool hasSetCSRValues() const;
329 
330  void startSystemAssembly();
331  void endSystemAssembly();
332 
333  public:
334  AlienBSRFormat* alienBsr(ITraceMng* trace_mng,
335  RunQueue& queue,
336  FemDoFsOnNodes& dofs_on_nodes) ;
337 
338  CSRFormatView& getCSRValues();
339  VariableDoFReal& getForcedValue();
340  VariableDoFBool& getForcedInfo();
341 
353  void setConstantMatrixSparsity(bool val);
354 
364  void setConstantMatrixValues(bool val);
365 
377  bool isMatrixSparsityConstant();
378 
388  bool isMatrixValuesConstant();
389 
390  IDoFLinearSystemFactory* linearSystemFactory() const
391  {
392  return m_linear_system_factory;
393  }
394 
395  private:
396 
397  IDoFLinearSystemImpl* m_p = nullptr;
398  IItemFamily* m_item_family = nullptr;
399  IDoFLinearSystemFactory* m_linear_system_factory = nullptr;
400  IDoFLinearSystemFactory* m_default_linear_system_factory = nullptr;
401 
402  private:
403 
404  void _checkInit() const;
405 
406  // Used by DoFLinearSystemRowEliminationHelper
407  void _eliminateRow(DoFLocalId row, Real value);
408  // Used by DoFLinearSystemRowColumnEliminationHelper
409  void _eliminateRowColumn(DoFLocalId row, Real value);
410 
411  // Used by DoFLinearSystemRowEliminationHelper and DoFLinearSystemRowColumnEliminationHelper
412  VariableDoFByte& _getEliminationInfo();
413  // Used by DoFLinearSystemRowEliminationHelper and DoFLinearSystemRowColumnEliminationHelper
414  VariableDoFReal& _getEliminationValue();
415 };
416

418 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
419 
420 } // namespace Arcane::FemUtils
